hackathon: AI Trading Agents ERC-8004 | lablab.ai | $55,000 SURGE token
description: AutoTradeX is an autonomous agent that continuously monitors ERC-20 token pairs on Uniswap v3 via The Graph subgraph, applies a lightweight offline-trained LSTM model (exported as ONNX and run with ONNX Runtime in Node.js) to predict short-term price moves, and when a threshold is met, creates and signs a limit order using the Uniswap v3 Permit2 interface. The agent's strategy (pair, model version, risk parameters) is minted as an ERC-8004 capability NFT, which can be queried by other contracts
angle: First agent that registers its trading strategy as an ERC-8004 capability token, enabling on-chain verification and composable delegation while executing AI-driven limit orders on Uniswap v3.
